other_observers: Bill Maynard; Bill and I found the bird.
specific_location: Upper Twin Pond, sedge meadow, Chico Basin Ranch
description: A small wren flushed in the sedges. Streaked crown, eye line not distinctive, like Marsh Wren, buffy overall looking wren, eliminate Marsh Wren. The bill was short and pale. Seen photos.Behaviors: Bill Maynard and I were walking in the wet sedge habitat, hoping to kick up a Le Conte's Sparrow, instead we kicked up this wren.Call: a soft call when it flewPlumage: fall
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
